subject: Mega Cannon Sigma / Bizu, a large silver robotic Machine Mutant with a cannon-integrated body, posed in a combat stance
description: A large, imposing robotic figure constructed of silver and grey metallic components stands in a combat-ready stance. The robot's body integrates what appears to be cannon-like weaponry into its structure. The figure has a broad, heavily armored chassis with mechanical limbs. The background is a muted grey-blue, keeping focus on the metallic figure. The overall design language is Machine Mutant — distinctly non-organic, constructed, mechanical.
foreground: large silver robotic figure with cannon-integrated body, mechanical limbs
